name: Homemade Chicken Gravy Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk powder, instant flour, bouillon granules, thyme, sage, and pepper.
2. Stir with a wire whisk to blend the ingredients together.
3. Cut in the butter or margarine until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 3-cup container with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Label the container with the date and contents.
6. Store in the refrigerator.
7. Use within 4-6 weeks.
